BlastOutput.BlastOutput_reference: Stephen F. Altschul, Thomas L. Madden, Alejandro A. Schäffer, Jinghui Zhang, Zheng Zhang, Webb Miller, and David J. Lipman (1997), "Gapped BLAST and PSI-BLAST: a new generation of protein database search programs", Nucleic Acids Res. 25:3389-3402.
BlastOutput.BlastOutput_query-def: NP_416128.1 fumarase C [Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655]

Iteration.Iteration_query-def: NP_416128.1 fumarase C [Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655]

Hit.Hit_def: MULTISPECIES: class II fumarate hydratase [Enterobacteriaceae] >ref|NP_416128.1| fumarase C [Escherichia coli str. K-12 substr. MG1655]
